name: Shield Level Select 6

data_sources.note: Brighthouse Shield Level Select 6-Year Annuity 424(b)(3) prospectus (Brighthouse Life Insurance Company of NY equivalent). Six-year buffer RILA variant; predecessor to Shield Level II 6-Year.

Brighthouse Shield Level Select 6-Year fact card. Withdrawal-charge schedule 7/7/6/5/4/3/0 confirmed; 10% free withdrawal annually after Year 1; buffer levels 10/15/20/25. Spec surrender 7/7/7/6/5/4 was incorrect — updated to prospectus-verified 7/7/6/5/4/3.
Brighthouse Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A (Excellent). Ratings under review with negative implications since 2025-11-10 pending Aquarian Capital acquisition.

verification_notes: Surrender schedule corrected from 7/7/7/6/5/4 to prospectus-verified 7/7/6/5/4/3; AM Best confirmed; 6-yr S&P 500 10% buffer cap 0.55 retained as upper end of public range.
